skills.name: Smartlog UI Guide
skills.author: Nash Framework
skills.description: UX compliance validator for Smartlog Ecosystem (TMS/WMS/OMS) against v2.3 principles. Validates navigation, visual patterns, AI integration, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), and edge cases.

skills.description: Automatically sharpen agent skills by mining PEN/WIN entries from agent files, converting past failures into regression tests, and iteratively improving agent capabilities.

skills.description: Apply 2026 industry best practices to sharpen Nash agents using patterns from OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, CrewAI. Reduce tokens by 60-80% while increasing quality.
